name: node-eslint-scope
title: node-eslint-scope
description:
ECMAScript scope analyzer for ESLint
ESLint Scope is the ECMAScript (a.k.a. JavaScrip) scope analyzer
used in ESLint.
.
It is a fork of escope.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-eslint-scope because ECMAScript scope analyzer for ESLint.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-eslint-scope as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-eslint-scope with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-eslint-scope --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
